title: Madibaz make history with semi-final breakthrough
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS – Madibaz made history earlier today, Sunday 20 April, by becoming the first football team from George to reach the semi-finals of the Easter Soccer Tournament.


> The student side secured their spot in the top four with a commanding 4-0 win over Zone 9 team Abahlali FC at Thembalethu Stadium.


Kamvelihle Dano was the standout performer, scoring a brilliant hat-trick, while Emile Jansen added a fourth to seal the victory.

Madibaz will be back in action at Thembalethu Stadium on Easter Monday for their semi-final clash, hoping to build on this milestone performance.

Abahlali FC were unable to withstand the attacking onslaught, with the lanky and determined Dano proving particularly difficult to contain.

Siphelo Matiya of Abahlali FC taking a powerful shot.‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
